summary: This document provides a research overview of Electronic Health Record (EHR) systems, defining key concepts like interoperability and data standards. It outlines eight functional modules of EHRs, such as clinical documentation and billing, while highlighting UK-specific compliance requirements like the NHS Data Security and Protection Toolkit. The content serves as foundational knowledge for integrating AI agents into NHS GP practice workflows.
